history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! How can I help you today? Do you have any dietary restrictions or allergies for the children?

history.speaker: client
history.text: No allergies for the kids, but my 3-year-old's milk allergy—I'll need a milk-free option. Also, we want ~2020 kcal total for three people. What's your best meal combo?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Sorry, I couldn't find matching menu items for your request. For your child (age 3) with milk allergy, we have milk-free options like Apple Slices. Could you share what you'd like for each person? I'll help build a safe combo that meets your calorie needs.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Me: Big Mac, 2 medium fries, Coke. 11yo: McChicken, 2 medium fries, Coke. 3yo: Apple Slices (milk-free) and water.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Perfect! For you: Big Mac, 2 medium fries, Coke. For your 11-year-old: McChicken, 2 medium fries, Coke. For your 3-year-old: Apple Slices (milk-free) and water. Total calories: ~2090 (very close to your target!). Is this your order? Let me know if you'd like to adjust anything.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's perfect! Thank you for the quick help 😊

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Great! Your order is ready for pickup. Enjoy your meal! 😊
